headingtext Fix spatial taxonomy: `bio_fst`

Where duplicate accepted taxa for the same species were identified, but this was not a straight name change and was geographic area dependent (e.g. a taxa was split geographically, or related taxa were erroneously recorded out of range), taxa names were updated using the `fix_spatial_taxonomy` function from *envDistribution* `r cite_package("envDistribution")` using  distributions sourced from IUCN Red List (https://www.iucnredlist.org/resources/spatial-data-download) and BirdLife International (https://datazone.birdlife.org/species/requestdis).
